paragraphs:
Celebrate The Devil Wears Prada with a special menu inspired by its iconic characters.
Whether you command the room like Miranda, turn heads like Andy, or add your bold touch like Nigel — your Starbucks order just got a whole new presence.
3 iconic drinks for every mood and every moment, available in stores for a limited time.

miranda.title: ☕ Miranda's Coffee
miranda.subtitle: A commanding presence, every detail calculated.
paragraphs: Caffè Latte with no foam, extra espresso and steamed milk at a higher temperature.

andy.title: 🌾 Andy's Oatmilk Cappuccino
andy.subtitle: Smooth, chic, and ready to turn heads.
paragraphs: Cappuccino with oat milk, caramel sauce and a light dusting of cinnamon.

nigel.title: 🖤 Nigel's Espresso con Panna
nigel.subtitle: Bold and impossible to ignore.
paragraphs: Double Espresso Con Panna with mocha sauce.
